content:
I am delighted to share that my research article, "Behind Bars, Beyond Justice: India's Undertrial Crisis," has been published in the Indian Journal of Law and Legal Research (IJLLR), Volume VIII, Issue III (ISSN: 2582-8878).

This research examines the challenges faced by undertrial prisoners in India, including prolonged detention, custodial violence, denial of legal aid, and the constitutional promise of a speedy and fair trial. It also explores landmark Supreme Court judgments, and a comparative analysis of prison systems in India and the United Kingdom.

I extend my sincere gratitude to my mentors, peers, and everyone who encouraged and supported me throughout this journey. I look forward to continuing my research and contributing to the development of a more just and equitable legal system.

Read the full article here: https://lnkd.in/gx_xFvRg
